docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALLAGHER, JOAN M. AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE PARROT ENTERPRISE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA VILLA D'ESTE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
